wooBatch.comment: Woo disclosure batch (case, status, deck board, document assessment refs) - admin-only workflow storage, provisioned so /woo has a real register/schema to resolve against

wooAssessment.comment: Per-document Woo openbaarheid assessment (weigeringsgronden, redaction, anonymized document) - admin-only workflow storage

wooBatch.title: WooBatch
wooBatch.summary: A Woo disclosure batch grouping the documents released for one Woo-verzoek case
wooBatch.description: A Woo disclosure batch represents one Woo-verzoek (Wet open overheid request) case moving through document collection, per-document assessment, review and publication to the public reading room. It is the OpenRegister-backed storage WooService reads and writes; the document queue itself is provisioned as a Deck board via the consumed deck leaf (ADR-022) rather than a bespoke queue table.

caseReference.description: The Procest Woo-verzoek case reference this batch belongs to
caseReference.title: Case Reference

deckBoardId.description: The Deck board id provisioned (or re-used) for this batch's document queue
deckBoardId.title: Deck Board ID

deckAvailable.description: Whether the Deck app was available when this batch was created; false means the document queue/board could not be provisioned
deckAvailable.title: Deck Available

documents.description: References to the document-assessment objects collected in this batch
documents.title: Documents

besluit.description: The Woo decision letter (besluit) content or reference for this batch
besluit.title: Besluit

inventarislijst.description: The generated inventarislijst (document inventory list) content or reference for this batch
inventarislijst.title: Inventarislijst

documentSummary.description: Derived per-status document assessment progress (counts, total, assessed, progress label); computed on read from the linked assessment objects, not independently authoritative storage
documentSummary.title: Document Summary

publishedAt.description: Timestamp the batch was published to the public reading room
publishedAt.title: Published At

publishedCount.description: Number of documents published to the reading room (openbaar + deels_openbaar assessments)
publishedCount.title: Published Count

wooPublication.description: The publication metadata recorded when this batch was published: decision date, request reference, category, document/published counts, besluit, inventarislijst, per-document listings and the reading-room URL
wooPublication.title: Woo Publication

updatedAt.description: Timestamp the batch was last updated
updatedAt.title: Updated At

createdBy.description: The user id that created this batch, or "system" when created without an active user session
createdBy.title: Created By

wooAssessment.title: WooAssessment
wooAssessment.summary: A per-document openbaarheid assessment within a Woo disclosure batch
wooAssessment.description: A document-assessment object represents the openbaarheid (public disclosure) decision for a single document collected in a Woo disclosure batch: which weigeringsgronden (WOO Art. 5.1/5.2 refusal grounds) apply, any redaction instructions, and the resulting anonymized document when partially disclosed. Each assessment is linked to a Deck card via the consumed deck leaf so its status is reflected on the document queue board.

documentReference.description: Reference to the source document being assessed (id or path from the originating case system)
documentReference.title: Document Reference

fileName.description: The file name of the document being assessed
fileName.title: File Name

fileType.description: The file type (MIME type or extension) of the document being assessed
fileType.title: File Type

assessment.description: The openbaarheid assessment decision for this document
assessment.title: Assessment

weigeringsgronden.description: Selected WOO Art. 5.1/5.2 refusal ground article references (required when the assessment is "niet_openbaar")
weigeringsgronden.title: Weigeringsgronden

redactionInstructions.description: Free-text redaction instructions for a partially-disclosed (deels_openbaar) document
redactionInstructions.title: Redaction Instructions

anonymizedDocument.description: Reference to the anonymized/redacted version of the document, used for deels_openbaar publication
anonymizedDocument.title: Anonymized Document

caseReference.description: The Procest Woo-verzoek case reference this assessment belongs to
caseReference.title: Case Reference

assessedBy.description: The user id that made this assessment decision, or "system" when assessed without an active user session
assessedBy.title: Assessed By

assessedAt.description: Timestamp this assessment decision was made
assessedAt.title: Assessed At
